name: 4'x5'6" Persian Area Rug Blue - Threshold™
description:
Bring understated elegance to your indoor space with this Printed Persian Area Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular area rug features a Persian pattern in blue with finished edges for a beautiful look that will coordinate easily with any room's aesthetic. The polyester fabric provides soft underfoot comfort, while latex backing helps to keep it in place.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
